svg.title: Object To AEB Request Signal Flow

g.text: Object To AEB Request Signal Flow
(FRADAR / ADAS -> FCA -> AEB -> ESC / EHB / VSM)
decelProfile = 1/2/3 from objectRiskClass and TTC bucket
2. ADAS converts perception into object risk and decel assist intent
3. FCA converts decel assist into FCW/AEB request
5. ESC / EHB / VSM apply chassis-level brake intervention
